name: UBA : Data Exfiltration by Removable Media
notes: Detects users that are transferring files to removable media such as USB and CD.
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : File Transfer to CD, BB:UBA : File Transfer to USB
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Data Exfiltration by Removable Media on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : File Transfer to CD, BB:UBA : File Transfer to USB
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Data Exfiltration by Removable Media
